Argument Reference

  • agreement_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • listing_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • package_version - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • signature - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) Display name for the accepted agreement.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for the accepted agreement.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for the accepted agreement.
